title: No bad property in btor2 file generated from verilog (`write_btor` should error for `$check` cells)

features.name: assert property with wire expression
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement using a wire expression derived from comparison operations

features.name: large bit-width register with assert property
features.description: Code should include a large bit-width register (greater than 200 bits) used in an assert property context
